name: optimiziramsi
description: optimiziramsi's Claude Code toolkit — reusable skills, commands, agents, and hooks shared across projects, shipped as a single plugin.

plugins.name: optimiziramsi-skills
plugins.description: The whole opsi toolkit in one plugin — git safety net, house commit style, lean reporting, session continuity, structured review, work-management flow (+ looper/grind runner), instruction-system upkeep, pattern registry, worktree protocol, repo utilities, and one-time scaffolds. Per-concern env kill-switches; self-gating guards.
